ItacPersonItem.Notes: Librettist, architect and librarian of the Biblioteca Universitaria in Padua. According to Maggiolo he joined the Ricovrati in 1675. See his biography by N. Balata and L. Finocchi Ghersi, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
